name: Sunglasses at Night
author: Kinky Joe
bootlegger: If a player is mad that the Wraith is the Wraith, they might die.
If a Vigormortis ability is active, any minions killed by a Vigormortis have their abilities.
A Monk protected player is unaffected by abilities of a player holding the Lil' Monsta.
If the most recently killed executee is the drunk Village Idiot, the Cannibal's Village Idiot ability is drunk.
Play Note: Recommend waking the Wraith before an Evil turned Goon so they have an option to close their eyes before the Goon learns them.
